user.title: Add your Xiaomi vacuum
user.description: Sign in by email for the live map.

menu_options.local: Device IP & token (control only, no map)

credentials.title: Sign in to Mi Home
credentials.description: Sign in once. It stays logged in after that.

data.username: Email, phone number or Mi account ID

local.title: Local connection
local.description: IP address and 32-character token. Control and sensors, no map.

captcha.title: Quick human check
captcha.description:
Xiaomi wants to know you're real. Type the characters below:

![captcha]({captcha_url})

twofa.title: Enter the code
twofa.description: Xiaomi just emailed you a code. Put it in below.

devices.title: Choose your vacuum
devices.description: There's more than one vacuum on this account. Pick the one to add.

miot_oauth.title: Enable real-time map auth
miot_oauth.description: Optional. This prepares the live MQTT map path. Skip it to keep the current polling map behaviour.

data.enable_miot_oauth: Enable OAuth for real-time map updates

miot_oauth_auth.title: Link Xiaomi OAuth
miot_oauth_auth.description:
Open this link, approve access, then paste the code from the redirect address bar:

{authorize_url}

reauth_confirm.title: Sign in to Xiaomi again
reauth_confirm.description: Your session ran out and couldn't renew on its own. Sign in again to bring the live map back.

data.username: Email, phone number or Mi account ID

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the vacuum at that IP with that token.
error.oauth_failed: Xiaomi OAuth failed. Start the link again and paste the new code.
error.oauth_region_failed: Couldn't work out the Xiaomi OAuth region from that code.

abort.already_configured: This vacuum is already set up.
abort.reauth_successful: You're back in. The live map's restored.
abort.login_failed: Xiaomi wouldn't accept that. Check your email and password, then try again.
abort.no_devices: No supported vacuums on this account.
abort.unsupported_model: This model isn't supported yet (ijai / Xiaomi-branded ijai vacuums only).

clean_segment.name: Clean room(s)
clean_segment.description: Start cleaning one or more rooms by their map room id.

segments.name: Rooms
segments.description: List of room ids to clean (from the map camera's "rooms" attribute).

refresh_map.name: Refresh map
refresh_map.description: Briefly starts the vacuum so it leaves the dock and uploads a fresh map, then sends it back to dock.

confirm_movement.name: Confirm movement
confirm_movement.description: Must be true. The vacuum will briefly leave the dock and return.
